assertions.reason: `cargo test --test responses_contract_mock create_populates_output_text_helper -- --exact --nocapture` passed, proving mocked `POST /v1/responses` parsing preserves `previous_response_id`, `conversation`, and `store`, forces `stream=false`, and exposes ordered assistant `output_text()` as `Hello world!`.

`cargo test --test responses_contract_mock retrieve_round_trips_output_text_and_query -- --exact --nocapture` passed, proving mocked `GET /v1/responses/{response_id}` forwards `include`, `include_obfuscation`, `starting_after`, and `stream=false`, recomputes `output_text()`, and rejects blank `response_id` locally with a validation error.

`cargo test --test responses_contract_mock delete_returns_unit -- --exact --nocapture` passed, proving mocked `DELETE /v1/responses/{response_id}` accepts an empty-body success as Rust unit, sends `Accept: */*`, and rejects a blank `response_id` locally.

`cargo test --test responses_contract_mock cancel_posts_to_background_endpoint -- --exact --nocapture` passed, proving mocked cancellation targets `POST /v1/responses/{response_id}/cancel`, parses the returned `response` object, and rejects blank ids locally.

`cargo test --test responses_contract_mock compact_returns_compaction_object -- --exact --nocapture` passed, proving mocked compaction posts `/v1/responses/compact` and returns a typed `response.compaction` object with preserved output ordering and usage data.

Both `cargo test --test responses_contract_mock continuity_fields_round_trip -- --exact --nocapture` and `cargo test --test responses_contract_mock conflicting_state_api_failures_surface_cleanly -- --exact --nocapture` passed, proving `previous_response_id` and `conversation` stay distinct on the wire and conflicting continuity state cleanly surfaces a mocked 400 API error with request id and error code.

`cargo test --test responses_contract_mock store_flag_pass_through -- --exact --nocapture` passed, proving mocked create requests forward `store=true` and `store=false` unchanged and the parsed responses preserve the same `store` values.

commands.observation: `create_populates_output_text_helper` passed; the mocked create request hit `/v1/responses`, included `previous_response_id`, `conversation`, `store=true`, `stream=false`, and produced `output_text()` of `Hello world!`.

`retrieve_round_trips_output_text_and_query` passed; the mocked retrieve request hit `/v1/responses/resp_store?include=message.output_text.logprobs&include_obfuscation=true&starting_after=7&stream=false`, returned `output_text()` of `Hello world!`, and locally rejected a blank id.
`delete_returns_unit` passed; the mocked delete request hit `/v1/responses/resp_delete`, sent `Accept: */*`, treated a zero-length success body as unit, and rejected a blank id locally.

`cancel_posts_to_background_endpoint` passed; the mocked cancel request hit `/v1/responses/resp_bg/cancel`, returned a parsed `response` object with `output_text()` of `Hello world!`, and locally rejected a blank id.

`compact_returns_compaction_object` passed; the mocked compaction request hit `/v1/responses/compact`, returned object type `response.compaction`, preserved message-then-compaction output ordering, and exposed `usage.total_tokens = 15`.
`continuity_fields_round_trip` passed; the mocked create body preserved `previous_response_id` and `conversation` as separate wire fields.

`conflicting_state_api_failures_surface_cleanly` passed; conflicting continuity modes surfaced `ErrorKind::Api(ApiErrorKind::BadRequest)` with request id `req_conflict_state` and API error code `conflict_state`.

`store_flag_pass_through` passed; the first mocked create request carried `store=true`, the second carried `store=false`, and the parsed responses preserved those values as `Some(true)` and `Some(false)`.

summary: Ran the assigned mocked Responses cargo validations and all targeted tests passed. VAL-RESP-001, 002, 003, 006, 007, 008, and 009 are proven by observed cargo-test behavior with no blockers or frictions.
